name: slideshot
description: Render HTML slides to high-resolution PNG, WebP, and PDF using Puppeteer. Generate carousels for LinkedIn, Instagram, and presentations.
long_description: Slideshot converts HTML into pixel-perfect slide images. Give it HTML with `.slide` divs and it renders each one as a 4x resolution PNG, WebP, or combined PDF — ready for LinkedIn carousels, Instagram posts, or presentation decks. Includes two built-in prompt templates: a generic clean layout and the Ketan Slides branded design system.

tools.name: render_html_to_images
tools.description: Render HTML slides to high-resolution PNG, WebP, and/or PDF files

tools.name: get_slide_prompt
tools.description: Get AI prompt template for generating slide HTML compatible with slideshot

prompts.name: generic-slides
prompts.text: Generate HTML slides using .slide divs at 540x675px with clean, minimal styling.

prompts.name: branded-slides
prompts.description: Ketan Slides design system prompt with monospace typography and corner accents
prompts.text: Generate HTML slides using the Ketan Slides design system with Space Mono font, corner accents, and teal/coral accent colors.
